untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) over-extended downtrend qualification, (2) gap detection and measurement against author-defined threshold, (3) price building on gap, (4) giant candle identification relative to multiple preceding small candles, (5) candle size comparisons across multiple bars. These multi-bar pattern recognition and comparative candle analysis requirements exceed the available indicator set. Specific parameters for gap_size, candle_size_definition, and number_of_small_candles_to_take_out are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: This is a complex multi-candle pattern recognition signal requiring: gap detection logic (not available in indicator set), relative candle size comparisons across bars (no comparative candle metrics provided), and trend overextension qualification. The signal describes a visual/morphological pattern (giant candle taking out multiple small candles) that cannot be reliably expressed with the available indicators. A gap-and-reversal strategy would require gap_pct or gap_size indicators not in the allowed list. Recommend implementing as custom backtest logic or adding gap detection indicators.
